_meta.purpose: PROPOSED atomic content blocks for a transactional purchase/booking flow. NOT yet established. Every block below is a `plan: null` STUB: the render runtime treats plan:null as a STOP. `componentsUsed` lists the real (already-registered) components each block will use; `planSketch` is a NON-AUTHORITATIVE hint for the designer capturing the block 1:1 from Figma. A block becomes usable only when a designer fills `plan`, sets a real `source` node id, and removes `requiresHumanReview`.
_meta.source: TO CAPTURE — Figma file uI6oKmJ0qDhsEuE0nFah2W, checkout reference screen (node id to be recorded).
_meta.placeholderConvention: <...> = fill with real content; optional trailing '?' means the node may be dropped when empty. A '<a|b|c>' placeholder is a closed choice.
_meta.refConvention: { "$ref": "block.id" } expands to that block's `plan` fragment. Only valid once plan is captured.

checkout.stepper.purpose: Read-only progress indicator across the flow steps (e.g. Verbindung → Reisende → Zahlung → Bestätigung), highlighting the current step.
checkout.stepper.gap: No official DB Stepper/Progress component is registered. Add one to ../components.json OR capture a composite. Do NOT fake it with Tags/Badges without design sign-off. See PROPOSAL.md gap #1.

checkout.form-field.purpose: A single labelled form control. The atomic unit of a fieldset.
checkout.form-field.note: Pick the control by data type: free text → Input; single choice from a known list → Select/CustomSelect; boolean/consent → Checkbox/Switch; one-of-few → Radio; long text → Textarea. Verify variant axes live via db-ux/get_component_props before capture (e.g. Input label=above|floating, state=empty|filled|active).

checkout.form-fieldset.purpose: A titled group of related form fields (e.g. 'Reisende', 'Kontaktdaten', 'Zahlungsart'). Single uniform gap.

checkout.option-row.purpose: One selectable, priced option in a fare/tariff list (e.g. Sparpreis). Exactly one interactive element (the Radio). Equal-item-action.
checkout.option-row.note: The whole row is selectable via a single Radio. NO nested button/link. Price is read-only text; title h4. Content is TOP-aligned; in a horizontal option-list all cards share one height (equalHeights) and identical styling so they read as equivalent (Gestalt-Ähnlichkeit / layout-guidelines.md).

checkout.summary-line.purpose: One line item in the order summary (label + amount), optionally with an 'Ändern' Link.

checkout.summary-card.purpose: Order summary: several summary lines, a Divider, then a bold total. Read-only except edit Links.

checkout.action-buttons.purpose: Flow navigation: a secondary 'Zurück' next to the single Brand forward/pay action.
checkout.action-buttons.note: ≤1 Brand button. 'Zurück' is ghost/outlined and only valid because it sits next to the stronger Brand button.
